title: Traditional Remodels
metaTitle: Traditional Remodels - Aging in Place Remodeling
metaDescription: Full-service home remodeling including kitchens, bathrooms, outdoor spaces, and custom features. Leveraging decades of remodeling experience.
intro: While our core focus centers on accessibility modifications, we frequently receive requests for standard home improvement work. The founder established his reputation through Axiom Designs, which handled comprehensive residential remodeling. We have a broad client portfolio and the majority of our clients will be happy to let you come see these projects firsthand.
